introduce:
Hi, I'm Tan Pham. I am a .NET developer and DevOps engineer, I have a strong understanding of the .NET framework, including C#, ASP.NET, and MVC. I am also proficient in DevOps concepts and practices, such as continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD), infrastructure as code (IaC), and containerization.

Leveraging readily attainable opportunities, I efficiently optimize real-time data structures for expedited delivery.
